name: Forrest Griffin
winProfile: 2 Elite+ wins, 2 Top-5+ wins, 4 ranked quality wins.
primeWindow: Mauricio Rua I → Mauricio Rua II

primeWindowDetail.endReason: Mauricio Rua II is the final counted loss in the shared elite UFC window.

shortCase: A 10-5 UFC champion with defining wins over Shogun and Rampage, balanced by no successful defense and three prime stoppage losses.
bestArgument: Griffin beat Shogun and Rampage back-to-back, won the light-heavyweight title, and added wins over Tito Ortiz, Rich Franklin, and Stephan Bonnar.
counterArgument: He never defended the title, finished only three UFC victories, and suffered five penalized losses before or during the counted prime.
whyRankedHere: Griffin beat Shogun and Rampage back-to-back, won the light-heavyweight title, and added wins over Tito Ortiz, Rich Franklin, and Stephan Bonnar.
whyNotHigher: He never defended the title, finished only three UFC victories, and suffered five penalized losses before or during the counted prime.
